issues.description: Missing condition 'Once Per Turn' - DSL should include 'condition' with 'type':'OncePerTurn'
Missing SearchDeck action to return 20 cards from trash to deck and shuffle - card text specifies 'You may return 20 cards from your trash to your deck and shuffle it' as the cost/effect prerequisite
Effect should be conditional on performing the SearchDeck action (return 20 cards from trash). Current DSL does not model the 'may' cost structure

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may return 20 cards from your trash to your deck and shuffle it: This Character gains [Double Attack] and +10000 power during this battle.
